sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New RUN Key Pointing to Suspicious Folder

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including those that may be vulnerable to remote software exploitation

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
